title: Savory Bouncy Filipino Rocket Bowl
description: A comforting Filipino dish featuring roasted plantain, caramelized onions, and peppery rocket. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss the plantains with 1 tablespoon of coconut oil and roast in the oven at 37575F for 20 minutes, or until caramelized.
In a pan, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of coconut oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onions and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Mince the garlic and add to the pan with the onions. Cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Add the chopped rocket to the pan and cook until wilted, stirring constantly.
In a small bowl, mix together the pork liver, fish sauce, black pepper, and salt.
Add the liver mixture to the pan with the onion and rocket mixture. Stir to combine.
Squeeze the lime juice over the top of the mixture and stir to combine.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve the Savory Bouncy Filipino Rocket Bowl hot, garnished with chopped cilantro if desired.
